value_signal: Google Cloud advertises up to $350,000 in Cloud credits for eligible AI startups, plus dedicated support and enablement.
eligibility_or_region_notes: The public page is designed for Scale-tier AI startups that use or plan to use Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform or Gemini, were founded within the last five years, raised Pre-Seed/Seed within the last five years or Series A within the last 12 months, and have not yet received more than $5,000 in Google Cloud credits.
deadline_or_currentness: Public application page is open and current; no close date is stated on the source page.
evidence_gate: Approved program application plus visible usable credits or other official confirmation.
ai_can_do_next: Audit AI Monkey against the public Scale-tier criteria and draft a one-page eligibility memo using only public company facts.
human_must_do_next: Human owner must confirm the funding history and startup profile before any application is prepared or submitted.
automation_boundary: No login, application submission, account creation, passwords, OTP, private keys, KYC, tax, bank, or private data handling.
why_this_is_not_income_yet: The credits are real, but no accepted application or usable credit balance has been verified.
suggested_next_check: If the company qualifies, build a no-spend application outline and list the exact public facts needed for the form.

income_gate.rule: Counts only after approved application or visible usable-credit delivery.
